1:
Noah asks you to revisit, in your mind's eye, your expeditions into the Crystal Tower, that you might record the memories in oneiromantic pearls for her viewing. She bids you speak with her again once you have filled a Pearl of the Labyrinth, a Pearl of the Tower, and a Pearl of the Darkness in the areas of the same name.

※The Labyrinth of the Ancients, Syrcus Tower, and the World of Darkness can be accessed via the Duty Finder.

She bids you speak with her again once you have filled a Pearl of the Labyrinth, a Pearl of the Tower, and a Pearl of the Darkness in the areas of the same name.

※The Labyrinth of the Ancients, Syrcus Tower, and the World of Darkness can be accessed via the Duty Finder.
